title: BEAD-8: Integration — Modules.cpp and Screen.cpp wiring
description: Wire CompassModule into Meshtastic firmware. Two lines in src/modules/Modules.cpp: include header + new CompassModule() in setupModules(). One menu entry in src/graphics/Screen.cpp triggering sendCapabilityQuery() + setFrames(). Verify firmware compiles for heltec_mesh_node_t114 and all existing functionality is unaffected.
close_reason: Modules.cpp wired (include + new CompassModule()), MenuHandler.cpp gets Captain's Compass entry in homeBaseMenu, CompassModule gains drawFrame/handleInputEvent/notifyUI/Observable<UIFrameEvent*>/InputBroker observer. Build passes for heltec-mesh-node-t114: 90.6% flash, 44.6% RAM

title: BEAD-7: CompassUI — drawFrame, arrow rendering, input handling
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/CompassUI.h and CompassUI.cpp. Implements wantUIFrame(), interceptingKeyboardInput(), drawFrame(), handleInputEvent(). Arrow geometry: tip(0,-18), wings(±9,-4), tail(0,12) rotated by headingError using sinf/cosf (nRF52840 has FPU). Blinks at 500ms when signal lost >90s. Screens: DISCOVERING node list, TRACKING compass, PAIR_INCOMING accept/reject, CALIBRATING sample counter, TRACKING_TREASURE with YOU'RE HERE at <15m.
close_reason: CompassUI.h and CompassUI.cpp written for 240x135 ST7789 TFT; arrow at (72,67) with rotatePoint+fillTriangle, dim/blink modes, all 9 state sub-renderers, 800ms long-press input handling

title: BEAD-6: CompassModule — SinglePortModule + OSThread packet handler
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/CompassModule.h and CompassModule.cpp. Extends SinglePortModule (COMPASS_APP port) and OSThread. Implements handleReceived() dispatching all 8 CompassMsgType values, runOnce() scheduler driving TRACKED position updates and TRACKING timeout detection, and send helpers (sendCapabilityQuery, sendPairRequest, sendPairAccept, sendPairReject, sendSessionEnd). Static instance pointer.
close_reason: CompassModule.h and CompassModule.cpp written. SinglePortModule+OSThread, full packet dispatch for all 8 message types, sendCapabilityQuery/PairRequest/Accept/Reject/SessionEnd helpers, runOnce() driving calibration sample drain, pair timeout, tickTracked() position updates, tickTracking() session pause detection.

title: BEAD-5: CompassState — FSM and NVS persistence
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/CompassState.h and CompassState.cpp. Full state machine with states: IDLE, DISCOVERING, AWAITING_PAIR_ACCEPT, PAIR_INCOMING, TRACKING, TRACKED, TRACKING_TREASURE, SESSION_PAUSED, CALIBRATING. NVS namespace 'compass'. Treasure CRUD (max 5), calibration sample accumulation (min 50 samples), Desire-side update suppression (5min stationary keepalive).
close_reason: CompassState.h and CompassState.cpp written. Full 9-state FSM, FSCom-based persistence for cal/treasures/settings under /compass/, Desire-side suppression via CompassMath::distanceMeters.

title: BEAD-3: Magnetometer driver — QMC5883L on Wire1
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/Magnetometer.h and Magnetometer.cpp. QMC5883L driver on Wire1 (I2C addr 0x0D). Implement begin() returning InitResult enum (OK/NOT_FOUND/INIT_FAILED), read() with DRDY polling, heading() applying calibration offsets, setCalibration()/getCalibration(). Init sequence: verify chip ID 0xFF at reg 0x0D, write 0x01 to SETPERIOD, 0x1D to CTRL1, 0x40 to CTRL2.
close_reason: Magnetometer.h and Magnetometer.cpp written. QMC5883L driver on Wire1: begin() probes 0x0D, verifies chip ID 0xFF, runs init sequence. DRDY-gated burst read. heading() applies hard-iron offsets.

title: BEAD-4: CompassMath — bearing, distance, heading error
description: Create src/modules/CompassModule/CompassMath.h and CompassMath.cpp. Pure stateless functions: bearing(fromLat,fromLon,toLat,toLon) using forward azimuth formula, distanceMeters() using Haversine, headingError(currentHeading,bearing) returning signed [-180,180] degrees. Inputs are integer lat/lon x1e7 matching GPS and protobuf convention.
close_reason: CompassMath.h and CompassMath.cpp written in src/modules/CompassModule/. bearing(), distanceMeters(), headingError() implemented using Haversine and forward azimuth formulas.

title: BEAD-2: Protobuf definition — compass.proto + COMPASS_APP port
description: Add compass.proto to protobufs/meshtastic/ defining CompassMsgType enum (8 values) and CompassPacket message. Add COMPASS_APP=300 to portnums.proto. Run bin/generate-proto.sh to produce nanopb generated files. Commit generated compass.pb.h and compass.pb.c.
close_reason: compass.proto written, COMPASS_APP=300 added to portnums.proto, nanopb codegen produced compass.pb.h/.pb.cpp and updated portnums.pb.h. All files in firmware dir.

title: BEAD-1: Variant patch — Wire1 instantiation
description: variant.cpp for heltec_mesh_node_t114 does not instantiate Wire1 despite variant.h already defining WIRE_INTERFACES_COUNT=2 and PIN_WIRE1_SDA/SCL. Add TwoWire Wire1 instance to variant.cpp using NRF_TWIM1 peripheral. This is required for the QMC5883L magnetometer driver to function.
close_reason: BSP auto-creates Wire1 from PIN_WIRE1_* defines in variant.h — confirmed by inspecting all other nRF52 variants with WIRE_INTERFACES_COUNT=2. No variant.cpp change needed.
